title: Welcome to my Blog everyone !
content: Welcome !After a long consideration of my life, I have decided to take a leap of faith to do a switch from Vulnerability Research to the path of Malware Analysis. This has indeed not been an easy decision to make. As an effort to remember this step in life, I have decided to do some blogging which I, hopefully, would continue to update.My current interests now lies in the following items :	- Malware Analysis	- OS InternalsI hope that eventually, this post could contain interesting and compiled resources for readers to learn from as well.
article:
1 min read Sep 5, 2022

Welcome to my Blog everyone !

A Welcome post. The first ever post.

MalwareOwl in Welcome
